items.title: Falcons pick up fifth-year option for RB Robinson
items.body_text: The Atlanta Falcons picked up running back Bijan Robinson's fifth-year contract option Friday.
items.author: Marc Raimondi

items.title: Sources: Colts seeking to trade away CB Moore
items.body_text: The Colts and Kenny Moore II have agreed to seek a trade to find the veteran cornerback a new team, sources told ESPN.

items.title: Former Jets, Louisvile QB Nagle dies at age 57
items.body_text: Former Jets and Louisville quarterback Browning Nagle has died at age 57.
items.author: Rich Cimini

items.title: Sources: DOJ opens NFL inquiry over TV deals
items.body_text: The Justice Department has begun an investigation into whether the NFL has violated anticompetitive practices with their television contracts that require consumers to pay subscription costs to watch some games, sources confirmed to ABC News.

items.title: Broncos owners acquire minority share of Rockies
items.body_text: The Rockies are bringing in Broncos owners Greg Penner and Carrie Walton Penner through a minority investment, with multiple reports saying they are purchasing about 40% of the team.

items.title: 5 Buckeyes, Simpson among 16 draft attendees
items.body_text: Five Ohio State players are among the 16 planning to attend the first round of the NFL draft on April 23 in Pittsburgh, a group that doesn't include Fernando Mendoza but does include fellow QB Ty Simpson.

items.title: Source: 49ers, ex-Bengals DE Sample reach deal
items.body_text: The 49ers agreed to a one-year contract with free agent defensive end Cam Sample, a source told NFL Network on Thursday.

items.title: Falcons pivot after RT McGary retires, add Taylor
items.body_text: Falcons right tackle Kaleb McGary is retiring, agent Collin Roberts announced.
items.author: Marc Raimondi

items.title: 💍 Seahawks QB Sam Darnold adds another ring
items.body_text: The Seahawks quarterback married his fiancée only months after winning Super Bowl LX.
